text.title: Accessibility-First Design Worked Example
text.summary: One full end-to-end worked example demonstrating a typical spec produced by this methodology.

section.title: Example trace
section.p: A typical AFD spec for a small modal — every constraint pinned, no deferred fields.

example.title: Checkout confirm modal spec
example.code: Component: checkout-confirm-modal Structure: h2, landmark=dialog, reading order = [title, body, actions] Focus order: [close-button, cancel-button, confirm-button], return focus to checkout-cta ARIA budget: aria-modal=true (native <dialog> emulation) Contrast tokens: text-on-surface=4.7:1, primary-button=5.2:1 Motion alternates: slide-in → opacity-fade-150ms
example.note: Engineer can implement without re-deriving structure, focus order, ARIA semantics, or motion behaviour.
